data.sql_used:
WITH Top10 AS (
    SELECT
        category AS "Category",
        SUM(likes) AS "Total Likes"
    FROM "dt_1773513164716_youtube_content_creation"
    GROUP BY category
    ORDER BY "Total Likes" DESC
    LIMIT 10
),
VlogsCategories AS (
    SELECT
        category AS "Category",
        SUM(likes) AS "Total Likes"
    FROM "dt_1773513164716_youtube_content_creation"
    WHERE category ILIKE '%vlogs%'
    GROUP BY category
)
SELECT "Category", "Total Likes" FROM Top10
UNION
SELECT "Category", "Total Likes" FROM VlogsCategories
ORDER BY "Total Likes" DESC
LIMIT 15;
suggested_follow_ups: Show me the average likes per video for these categories.
